display.name: Traveler Under the Wreck
display.short_description: A light wagon has rolled on its side in the ditch. Someone is still pinned under the frame, one hand stretched toward a split medicine satchel.

choices.label: Haul the beam clear
choices.summary: Wrench the frame up just long enough to drag the traveler free and keep what they press into your hand.

choices.label: Rifle the spilled purse
choices.summary: Take the road coins from the mud and leave the wagon to settle on its own.
